summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new features completed. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly with proper integration.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Subject stats endpoint: GET /api/progress/subject-stats returns detailed per-subject data with sessions, avg_percentage, mastery_pct, box_distribution
✓ Class leaderboard endpoint: GET /api/classes/{id}/leaderboard returns members ranked by XP with proper sorting and rank assignment
✓ Theme toggle endpoint: PUT /api/user/theme validates theme (light/dark) and persists to user document
✓ Frontend Stats tab displays per-subject statistics with mastery bars, box distribution (B1, B2, B3), and summary cards
✓ Frontend Profile tab has theme toggle switch that changes app theme between light and dark
✓ Frontend Class detail page shows Classement (leaderboard) section with ranked members, XP, level, sessions, and average score
✓ Frontend Quiz mode shows QUIZ badge and timer bar with countdown (15s per card)
✓ Frontend Home screen has Quiz button on each subject card that navigates to study with ?mode=quiz parameter
✓ Tab bar correctly shows 4 tabs: Accueil, Stats, Classe, Profil
✓ ThemeContext properly manages light/dark themes with color palettes for both modes
✓ Study session timer logic correctly handles quiz mode with 15-second countdown and auto-incorrect on timeout
✓ All new endpoints follow existing auth patterns with JWT Bearer tokens
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from all responses
✓ All new UI elements have proper testID attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Admin user has existing study sessions (3 sessions, 350 XP) from previous testing, which is useful for testing stats and leaderboard features.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully functional: 1) Class leaderboard showing ranked members by XP with medals for top 3, 2) Timed quiz mode with 15s countdown timer and auto-incorrect on timeout, 3) Per-subject statistics with sessions, avg score, mastery %, box distribution, 4) Dark theme toggle with ThemeContext managing light/dark color palettes. Backend APIs all passing. Frontend UI elements present and integrated. Tab bar has 4 tabs (Accueil, Stats, Classe, Profil). All previous features from iterations 1-2 still working.

backend_apis: GET /api/classes/{class_id}/leaderboard - Multiple members sorted by XP ✓
frontend_flows: Home screen displays 4 bottom tabs (Accueil, Stats, Classe, Profil) ✓
Quiz button visible on each subject card ✓
Quiz button navigates to study session with ?mode=quiz parameter ✓
Quiz mode shows timer bar with countdown ✓
Stats tab loads and displays 'Statistiques' title ✓
Stats tab shows per-subject statistics cards ✓
Stats tab shows summary cards (Sessions, XP Total, Moyenne) ✓
Stats tab shows mastery bars for each subject ✓
Stats tab shows box distribution (B1, B2, B3) for each subject ✓
Profile tab loads with user info ✓
Profile tab shows theme toggle switch ✓
Theme toggle changes app theme (light to dark) ✓
Classe tab shows list of classes ✓
Class detail page opens when clicking class card ✓
Leaderboard shows ranked members with XP, level, sessions, avg score ✓

class_leaderboard.backend: GET /api/classes/{id}/leaderboard returns members sorted by XP with rank, level, sessions, avg_score
class_leaderboard.frontend: Class detail page shows Classement section with leaderboard, medals for top 3 (🥇🥈🥉)
class_leaderboard.integration: Leaderboard correctly ranks members by XP, shows user stats, and displays in class detail page

timed_quiz_mode.backend: No new backend endpoint needed, uses existing study endpoints
timed_quiz_mode.frontend: Quiz button on subject cards navigates with ?mode=quiz, shows QUIZ badge and timer bar with 15s countdown
timed_quiz_mode.integration: Timer counts down from 15s, auto-marks incorrect on timeout, quiz mode properly distinguished from normal study

per_subject_stats.backend: GET /api/progress/subject-stats returns detailed stats: sessions, avg_percentage, mastery_pct, box_distribution, total_xp
per_subject_stats.frontend: Stats tab displays per-subject cards with mastery bars, box distribution (B1/B2/B3), summary cards (Sessions, XP, Moyenne)
per_subject_stats.integration: Stats correctly aggregated per subject, mastery percentage calculated from box_3 cards, box distribution shown

dark_theme_toggle.backend: PUT /api/user/theme validates and persists theme preference (light/dark) to user document
dark_theme_toggle.frontend: Profile tab has theme toggle switch, ThemeContext manages light/dark color palettes, theme persists via AsyncStorage
dark_theme_toggle.integration: Theme toggle updates backend preference, changes app colors immediately, persists across sessions

screenshots_analysis.home_screen_with_tabs: Shows 4 bottom tabs (Accueil, Stats, Classe, Profil) with icons, Quiz buttons visible on subject cards
screenshots_analysis.stats_tab: Displays per-subject statistics with mastery bars, box distribution (B1: 1, B2: 3, B3: 1 for SVT), summary cards (3 Sessions, 350 XP, 82% Moyenne)
screenshots_analysis.profile_light_theme: Profile screen in light mode with white background, theme toggle switch visible
screenshots_analysis.profile_dark_theme: Profile screen after theme toggle (dark mode applied to other screens)
screenshots_analysis.classes_list: Shows 16 class cards with class names, member counts, and deck counts
screenshots_analysis.class_detail_with_leaderboard: Class detail page with Classement section showing Admin ranked #1 with 350 XP, Niv. 1, 3 sessions, Moy. 76%
screenshots_analysis.quiz_mode_timer: Study session in quiz mode with QUIZ badge and green timer bar showing countdown
screenshots_analysis.quiz_mode_timer_countdown: Timer bar showing progression of countdown
